_comment: Curated local-model registry (DATA, not code) for `tl local pull <alias>` and the dashboard model picker. Adding/curating a model is a data edit, not a release. This is only a convenience shortlist — ANY GGUF works via the escape hatch `tl local pull hf.co/<org>/<repo>:<quant>` (or --repo/--file), so models released after this file was written need no code change. Sizes are approximate for the default quant. Only vendor-official, verified GGUF repos are listed here.

models.name: NVIDIA Nemotron-3 Nano 4B
models.note: Top pick: same family as the cloud default (nemotron-3-super-120b), so one prompt style spans local primary + cloud fallback (ideal hybrid). Explicitly post-trained on structured-output + instruction-following, which targets the JSON/overview calls. Needs a recent llama.cpp for the Nemotron architecture.

models.name: Qwen2.5 3B Instruct
models.note: Strong JSON/instruction-following for its size; runs comfortably on CPU. Note the 3B is under Qwen's own license, not Apache-2.0 (the 7B/1.5B are Apache).

models.name: Qwen2.5 1.5B Instruct
models.note: Smallest/fastest permissive option for weak CPUs. Weaker on long structured markdown; the deterministic fallbacks cover the misses.

models.name: Qwen2.5 7B Instruct
models.note: Best quality/size on a laptop with RAM to spare; permissive license. May ship as split GGUF parts.
